title: Product Safety Report: Kids Stuff Crazy Foaming Soap (2602-0273)
text:
Product Safety Report: Kids Stuff Crazy Foaming Soap (2602-0273)
Product Safety Report for Kids Stuff Crazy Foaming Soap presenting a risk of burns.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
27 February 2026
Last updated
26 June 2026
 —
See all updates
Alert type:
Product safety report
Risk level:
Not provided
Product category:
Cosmetics
Measure type:
Other
Recall/alert date:
27 February 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: Kids Stuff Crazy Foaming Soap
Hazard: The product contains butane, isobutane and propane, which are flammable gases. If the product is dispensed on to a flame or other ignition source, or comes into contact with a naked flame, the foam may ignite causing burns to the user.
Corrective action: The Office for Product Safety and Standards (OPSS) suspended the sale of this product because of safety concerns while further investigations were carried out. The business voluntarily withdrew the product and arranged for its safe disposal. Consequently, the Suspension Notice was revoked on 17th June 2026.
Consumers who have the affected product should check the batch number and contact their retailer.
Product information
Type
Cosmetics - Foaming Soap
Brand
Kids Stuff
Models
Pink, Blue and Purple
Batch Numbers
26109E 3 (pink), 25947E 1 (pink), 26112E 5 (blue), 26112E 4 (blue), 25948E 3 (blue), 25651E (purple)
Country of Origin
United Kingdom
Product Description
200ml foaming soap, available in multiple colours.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
The product contains butane, isobutane and propane, which are flammable gases. If the product is dispensed on to a flame or other ignition source, or comes into contact with a naked flame, the foam may ignite causing burns to the user.
Corrective action
The Office for Product Safety and Standards (OPSS) suspended the sale of this product because of safety concerns while further investigations were carried out. The business voluntarily withdrew the product and arranged for its safe disposal. Consequently, the Suspension Notice was revoked on 17th June 2026.
Consumers who have the affected product should check the batch number and contact their retailer.
Additional information
OPSS enforcement actions 1 October 2025 to 31 March 2026 - GOV.UK
PSD notification number: 2602-0273
Notified by: Office for Product Safety and Standards
Updates to this page
Published 27 February 2026
Last updated 26 June 2026

title: Product Recall: Azara Travel Adaptor (2601-0270)
text:
Product Recall: Azara Travel Adaptor (2601-0270)
Product Recall for Azara Travel Adaptor presenting a serious risk of electric shock.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
25 June 2026
Alert type:
Product recall
Risk level:
Serious
Product category:
Electrical appliances and equipment
Measure type:
Recall of the product from end users
Recall/alert date:
25 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: Azara Travel Adaptor
Hazard: The product presents a risk of electric shock as the shutters do not prevent access to live parts.
Corrective action: The authority has required the recall of the product from end users.
Product information
Type
Electrical appliances and equipment - Adaptors (Electrical)
Brand
Azara
Model
SP-128
Barcode
X000R7IJOH
Country of Origin
China
Product Description
Universal travel adaptor with USB port.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
The product presents a serious risk of electric shock because the shutter mechanism is inadequate and allows access to live parts. Consumers could touch these parts during use and receive an electric shock. Improvements are also required to product labelling and marking.
The product does not meet the requirements of the Plugs & Sockets etc. (Safety) Regulations 1994.
Corrective action
The local authority is requiring the recall of the product from end users.
Consumers who own the product are advised to stop using it immediately and contact the distributor they purchased from for redress.
Additional information
PSD notification number: 2601-0270
Notified by: Local Authority Trading Standards
Updates to this page
Published 25 June 2026
Contents

title: Product Recall: Universal Travel Adaptor 931E (2601-0268)
text:
Product Recall: Universal Travel Adaptor 931E (2601-0268)
Product Recall for Universal Travel Adaptor 931E presenting a high risk of electric shock.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
25 June 2026
Alert type:
Product recall
Risk level:
High
Product category:
Electrical appliances and equipment
Measure type:
Recall of the product from end users
Recall/alert date:
25 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: Universal Travel Adaptor 931E
Hazard: The product presents a risk of electric shock as the shutters do not prevent access to live parts.
Corrective action: The authority has required the recall of the product from end users.
Product information
Type
Electrical appliances and equipment - Adaptors (Electrical)
Model
931E
Barcode
7982546889420
Country of Origin
China
Product Description
White universal travel adaptor with USB output.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
The product presents a risk of electric shock because the shutters do not prevent access to live internal parts. A consumer could touch these parts and receive an electric shock. In addition, the plug face does not meet the dimensional requirements of BS 1363 and does not make a secure connection with the socket. Improvements are also required to product labelling and marking.
The product does not meet the requirements of the Plugs & Sockets etc. (Safety) Regulations 1994.
Corrective action
The local authority is requiring the recall of the product from end users.
Consumers who own the product are advised to stop using it immediately and contact the distributor they purchased from for redress.

PSD notification number: 2601-0268
Notified by: Local Authority Trading Standards
Updates to this page

Contents

title: Product Recall: Honeywell Lighting Controls Connect UltraLite CDW4U1UL and CDW6U1UL (2606-0168)
text:
Product Recall: Honeywell Lighting Controls Connect UltraLite CDW4U1UL and CDW6U1UL (2606-0168)
Product Recall for Honeywell Lightng Controls Connect UltraLite presenting a risk of electric shock.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
25 June 2026
Alert type:
Product recall
Risk level:
Low
Product category:
Electrical appliances and equipment
Measure type:
Recall of the product from end users
Recall/alert date:
25 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: Honeywell Lighting Controls Connect UltraLite CDW4U1UL and CDW6U1UL
Hazard: The product presents a risk of electric shock as specific batches of the product have incorrect adhesion, which can cause a live wire to be exposed.
Corrective action: The products have been recalled by Honeywell Lighting Controls.
Product information
Type
Electrical appliances and equipment - Industrial Lighting Equipment
Brand
Honeywell Lighting Controls
Models
CDW4U1UL and CDW6U1UL
Batch identifier
PCB dated WK 28 YR 25, code states July 2025
Country of Origin
United Kingdom
Product Description
The product allows presence detectors and luminaires to be linked using standard connectors.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
Specific batches of the product have incorrect adhesion of the blanking panel to the basket, which may lead to a 230v wire being exposed.
This wire could provide an electric shock to installers, or professionals maintaining the product.
The product does not meet the requirements of the Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016.
Corrective action
The product has been recalled by Honeywell Lighting Controls.
Customers with affected batches have been contacted by Honeywell Lighting Controls and instructed to return the products for a free replacement.
Additional information
PSD notification number: 2606-0168
Notified by: Local Authority Trading Standards
Updates to this page
Published 25 June 2026
Contents

title: Product Safety Report: UPhitnis 10 Inch Ring Light with Tripod Stand sold via Amazon (2605-0001)
text:
Product Safety Report: UPhitnis 10 Inch Ring Light with Tripod Stand sold via Amazon (2605-0001)
Product Safety Report for UPhitnis 10 Inch Ring Light with Tripod Stand presenting a serious risk of injuries and burns.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
25 June 2026
Alert type:
Product safety report
Risk level:
Serious
Product category:
Lighting equipment
Measure type:
Import rejected at border
Recall/alert date:
25 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: UPhitnis 10 Inch Ring Light with Tripod Stand sold via Amazon
Hazard: The product presents a serious risk of injuries and burns as the remote contains easily accessible button batteries.
Corrective action: The import has been rejected at the border.
Product information
Type
Lighting equipment - Tripod (Lighting)
Brand
Shenzhen Chuangliying Technology Co., Ltd.
Model
SL01
ASIN
B0882TZ8PV
Country of Origin
China
Product Description
Ring light with tripod and camera remote.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
The product presents a serious risk of injuries because the remote contains an easily accessible button battery. This battery may be placed in the mouth and swallowed, causing damage to the gastrointestinal tract.
The product does not meet the requirements of the General Product Safety Regulations 2005.
Corrective action
The import has been rejected at the border.
Owners are advised to keep the product out of reach of young children. Contact the distributor you purchased from to request redress.
Additional information
PSD notification number: 2605-0001
Notified by: Office for Product Safety and Standards
Updates to this page
Published 25 June 2026
Contents

title: Product Safety Report: One Sport E-Bikes (2606-0127)
text:
Product Safety Report: One Sport E-Bikes (2606-0127)
Product Safety Report for One Sport E-Bikes presenting a serious risk of fire and electric shock.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
25 June 2026
Alert type:
Product safety report
Risk level:
Serious
Product category:
Hobby / sports equipment
Measure type:
Import rejected at border
Recall/alert date:
25 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Affected Products
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: One Sport E-Bikes
Hazard: The products present a serious risk of fire and electric shock as they are supplied with noncompliant chargers.
Corrective action: The import has been rejected at the border.
Product information
Type
Hobby/sports equipment – Cycles (Powered)
Brand
One Sport
Model
OT05 & OT12, OT08 PRO, OT05PRO
Country of Origin
China
Product Description
Consignment of black and white e-bikes.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Affected Products
Model
Battery Charger
Adaptor
Product Carton Identifiers
OT05
Hyleton / HLT-180-4202000
HK-7
OT05-WHIT3 09ZC001175, IB003260311RS-S7-7
OT12
Hyleton / HLT-180-4202000
HK-7
OT12-BLK2, 09ZC001119 IB003260311RS-S9-7
OT08 PRO
FY1505462000 / NO MODEL
HK-7
OT08 PRO-DAG2, EU-KM-YGX-09ZC001169 IB003260311RS-S10-101
OT05PRO
MDA / BC337360030
HK-7
OT05PRO-LIG2, EU-KM 09ZC001135 IB003260311RS-S3-5
Hazard
The product presents a serious risk of fire because it is supplied with a plug that does not conform to the dimensional requirements of BS 1363 and does not have a fuse link. A fuse is required to ensure the safe operation of the product under fault conditions. Should a fault occur, the plug may overheat and catch fire. The adaptor is also insufficiently earthed, presenting a risk of electric shock. Improvements are also required to the product labelling and documentation.
The product does not meet the requirements of the Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016, or the Plugs & Sockets etc (Safety) Regulations 1994.
Corrective action
The import has been rejected at the border.
Additional information
PSD notification number: 2606-0127
Notified by: Local Authority Trading Standards
Updates to this page
Published 25 June 2026
Contents

title: Product Recall: Squeezy Dumplings (2606-0196)
text:
Product Recall: Squeezy Dumplings (2606-0196)
Product Recall for Squeezy Dumplings presenting a serious chemical risk.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
25 June 2026
Alert type:
Product recall
Risk level:
Serious
Product category:
Toys
Measure type:
Recall of the product from end users
Recall/alert date:
25 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: Squeezy Dumplings sold by Samsons Cash and Carry Ltd
Hazard: The product presents a serious chemical risk because the outer layer contains an excess concentration of benzene.
Corrective action: The products have been recalled from end users by Samsons Cash and Carry Ltd
Product information
Type
Toys - Dolls/Soft Toys (Non Powered)
Distributor
Samsons Cash and Carry Ltd, Cardiff, CF11 8TZ
Identifiers
No batch numbers or product identifiers are present on the product or its packaging.
Country of Origin
China
Product Description
Plastic ‘basket style’ pot containing a single soft plastic polymer dumpling toy.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
The product presents a serious chemical risk because the outer layer contains an excess concentration of benzene (20mg/kg). If inhaled, benzene can cause irritation to the eyes, nose and throat. Exposure to large amounts may also cause a burning feeling throughout the digestive tract and skin irritation. Improvements are also required to product labelling and marking.
Further information regarding benzene can be found on Gov.uk at the following link:
https://www.gov.uk/government/publications/benzene-general-information-incident-management-and-toxicology/benzene-general-information
The product does not meet the requirements of the Toys (Safety) Regulations 2011.
Corrective action
The product has been recalled from end users by Samsons Cash and Carry Ltd.
Owners are advised to stop using the product and keep it out of reach of children. For more information, please contact
samsonscashandcarry@hotmail.co.uk
Additional information
PSD notification number: 2606-0196
Notified by: Local Authority Trading Standards
Updates to this page
Published 25 June 2026
Contents

title: Product Recall: Baby Floats with Canopies sold via TikTok (2606-0176)
text:
Product Recall: Baby Floats with Canopies sold via TikTok (2606-0176)
Product Recall for Baby Floats with Canopies sold via TikTok presenting a risk of drowning.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
22 June 2026
Alert type:
Product recall
Risk level:
Not provided
Product category:
Hobby / sports equipment
Measure type:
Recall of the product from end users
and
Removal of the listing by the online marketplace
Recall/alert date:
22 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: Baby Floats with Canopies
Hazard: The products present a risk of drowning because the canopies and overhead structures may increase wind resistance and affect the stability of the float.
Corrective action: The products have been recalled from end users by TikTok and the listings have been removed.
Product information
Type
Hobby/sports equipment - Swimming Training Aids
Country of Origin
China
Product Description
Baby floats equipped with canopies, sunshades, umbrellas, or other overhead covering structures attached to the float.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
The products present a risk of drowning because the canopies and overhead structures may increase wind resistance and affect the stability of the float. In windy conditions, the float may be lifted, tipped over, pushed away, or destabilised, creating risks of falls, capsizing, separation from the caregiver, entrapment, or drowning.
The products do not meet the requirements of the General Product Safety Regulations 2005.
Corrective action
The products have been recalled from end users by TikTok and the listings have been removed.
Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled items and contact their place of purchase for redress.
Additional information
PSD notification number: 2606-0176
Notified by: Office for Product Safety and Standards
Updates to this page
Published 22 June 2026
Contents

title: Product Recall: Baby Neck Floats sold via TikTok (2606-0175)
text:
Product Recall: Baby Neck Floats sold via TikTok (2606-0175)
Product Recall for Baby Neck Floats presenting a risk of drowning.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
22 June 2026
Alert type:
Product recall
Risk level:
Not provided
Product category:
Hobby / sports equipment
Measure type:
Recall of the product from end users
and
Removal of the listing by the online marketplace
Recall/alert date:
22 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: Baby Neck Floats sold via TikTok
Hazard: These products present a risk of drowning as they may place inappropriate pressure on the infant’s neck and may restrict normal movement or airway positioning.
Corrective action: The products have been recalled from end users by TikTok and the listings have been removed.
Product information
Type
Hobby/sports equipment - Swimming Training Aids
Country of Origin
China
Product Description
Baby floats designed to be worn around or secured to an infant’s neck, where the infant’s head is supported by the float while the body remains suspended in the water. This includes inflatable neck rings and similar neck-support flotation devices marketed for babies or infants.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
These products present a risk of drowning as they may place inappropriate pressure on the infant’s neck and may restrict normal movement or airway positioning. They may also increase the risk of the infant slipping through, becoming trapped, overturning, or being left in an unsafe floating position, potentially resulting in neck injury, asphyxiation, drowning, or other serious harm.
The products do not meet the requirements of the General Product Safety Regulations 2005.
Corrective action
The products have been recalled by TikTok and the listings have been removed.
Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled items and contact their place of purchase for redress.
Additional information
PSD notification number: 2606-0175
Notified by: Office for Product Safety and Standards
Updates to this page
Published 22 June 2026
Contents

title: Product Recall: Toy-Like Baby Floats sold via TikTok (2606-0177)
text:
Product Recall: Toy-Like Baby Floats sold via TikTok (2606-0177)
Product Recall for Toy-Like Baby Floats presenting a risk of drowning.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
22 June 2026
Alert type:
Product recall
Risk level:
Not provided
Product category:
Hobby / sports equipment
Measure type:
Recall of the product from end users
and
Removal of the listing by the online marketplace
Recall/alert date:
22 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: Toy-Like Baby Floats sold via TikTok
Hazard: The products present a risk of drowning as toy-like designs may mislead consumers into treating the product as a play item rather than a flotation-related product requiring constant adult supervision.
Corrective action: The products have been recalled from end users by TikTok and the listings have been removed.
Product information
Type
Hobby/sports equipment - Swimming Training Aids
Country of Origin
China
Product Description
Baby floats designed to resemble toys, animals, cartoon characters, inflatable play items, ride-on toys, novelty products, or other entertainment-oriented products. This includes floats with playful shapes, animal heads, decorative elements, or designs that may cause the product to be perceived as a toy rather than a safety-sensitive water product.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
The products present a risk of drowning as toy-like designs may mislead consumers into treating the product as a play item rather than a flotation-related product requiring constant adult supervision. This may increase the risk of misuse, overreliance on the product, reduced caregiver vigilance, unsafe play behaviour, instability, tipping, entrapment, or drowning.
The products do not meet the requirements of the General Product Safety Regulations 2005.
Corrective action
The products have been recalled from end users by TikTok and the listings have been removed.
We recommend that consumers stop using the recalled products immediately and keep them out of reach of children. Contact the distributor you purchased from to request redress.
Additional information
PSD notification number: 2606-0177
Notified by: Office for Product Safety and Standards
Updates to this page
Published 22 June 2026
Contents

title: Product Recall: Light-Blue or Low-Visibility Baby Floats sold via TikTok (2606-0178)
text:
Product Recall: Light-Blue or Low-Visibility Baby Floats sold via TikTok (2606-0178)
Product Recall for Light-Blue or Low-Visibility Baby Floats presenting a risk of drowning.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
22 June 2026
Alert type:
Product recall
Risk level:
Not provided
Product category:
Hobby / sports equipment
Measure type:
Recall of the product from end users
and
Removal of the listing by the online marketplace
Recall/alert date:
22 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: Light-Blue or Low-Visibility Baby Floats sold via TikTok
Hazard: The products present a risk of drowning as low-visibility colours may make it difficult for caregivers or lifeguards to quickly locate the child in the water.
Corrective action: The products have been recalled from end users by TikTok and the listings have been removed.
Product information
Type
Hobby/sports equipment - Swimming Training Aids
Country of Origin
China
Product Description
Baby floats that are predominantly light-blue coloured, transparent, translucent, pastel, or otherwise low-contrast in appearance.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
The products present a risk of drowning as low-visibility colours may make it difficult for caregivers or lifeguards to quickly locate the child in the water. This may delay supervision or rescue response, increasing the risk of drowning or serious injury.
The products do not meet the requirements of the General Product Safety Regulations 2005.
Corrective action
The products have been recalled from end users by TikTok and the listings have been removed.
We recommend that consumers stop using the recalled products immediately and keep them out of reach of children. Contact the distributor you purchased from to request redress.
Additional information
PSD notification number: 2606-0178
Notified by: Office for Product Safety and Standards
Updates to this page
Published 22 June 2026
Contents

title: Product Safety Report: LED Flood Light sold via Amazon (2606-0092)
text:
Product Safety Report: LED Flood Light sold via Amazon (2606-0092)
Product Safety Report for LED Flood Light presenting a serious risk of fire.
From:
Office for Product Safety and Standards
Published
22 June 2026
Alert type:
Product safety report
Risk level:
Serious
Product category:
Lighting equipment
Measure type:
Import rejected at border
and
Removal of the listing by the online marketplace
Recall/alert date:
19 June 2026
Contents
Summary
Product information
Hazard
Corrective action
Additional information
Summary
Product: LED Flood Light sold via Amazon
Hazard: The product presents a serious risk of fire because the supplied cord is not suitable for outdoor use and will deteriorate in the sun.
Corrective action: The import has been rejected at the border.
The product has been removed from the online marketplace (Amazon).
Product information
Type
Lighting equipment - Mounted Lighting
Manufacturer
Zhongshan Cheer Lighting Co Ltd
Amazon ASINs
B0CQLN5WZ8, B0CQLPDKJ1
Plug
Ubill, UBL8008
Barcode
X001XDPTW5
Country of Origin
China
Product Description
A mounted outdoor LED floodlight with attached wall plug.
Product Report and Image
Link to product image and PDF
Hazard
The product presents a serious risk of fire because the supplied cord is not suitable for outdoor use and will deteriorate in the sun. Over time, this could cause the product to overheat and catch fire. The supplied plug also does not meet the dimensional requirements of BS 1363 and cannot make a secure connection with the socket.
The product does not meet the requirements of the Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 or the Plugs & Sockets etc (Safety) Regulations 1994.
Corrective action
The import has been rejected at the border.
The product has been removed from the online marketplace (Amazon).
Consumers should stop using the product immediately and contact the distributor for redress.
Additional information
PSD notification number: 2606-0092
Notified by: Local Authority Trading Standards
Updates to this page
Published 22 June 2026
Contents

title: Class 2 Medicines Recall: Becton Dickinson UK Ltd, ChloraPrep 2% 1mL and ChloraPrep Frepp 2% 1.5mL applicators, EL(26)A/26
text:
Class 2 Medicines Recall: Becton Dickinson UK Ltd, ChloraPrep 2% 1mL and ChloraPrep Frepp 2% 1.5mL applicators, EL(26)A/26
Becton Dickinson UK Ltd are recalling batches of ChloraPrep 2% 1mL applicators and ChloraPrep Frepp 2% 1.5 mL applicators due to a potential breach of sterility in the packaging process.
From:
Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency
Published
2 June 2026
Message type:
Medicines recall/notification
Medical specialty:
Dispensing GP practices
,
General practice
and
Pharmacy
Issued:
2 June 2026
Contents
DMRC reference number
Marketing Authorisation Holder
Medicine Details
ChloraPrep 2% w/v / 70% v/v cutaneous solution 1mL applicators
ChloraPrep Frepp 2% w/v / 70% v/v cutaneous solution 1.5 mL applicators
Affected Lot Batch Numbers
Background
Advice for Healthcare Professionals
Advice for Healthcare Professionals to Provide to Patients
Additional information
Download document
DMRC reference number
DMRC - 39617055
Marketing Authorisation Holder
Becton Dickinson UK Ltd
Medicine Details
ChloraPrep 2% w/v / 70% v/v cutaneous solution 1mL applicators
PL: 05920/0002
Active Ingredient: chlorhexidine gluconate 2%w/v and isopropyl alcohol 70% v/v
SNOMED code: 40818111000001106
GTIN: 20885403491761  10885403491764
ChloraPrep Frepp 2% w/v / 70% v/v cutaneous solution 1.5 mL applicators
PL: 05920/0002
Active Ingredient: chlorhexidine gluconate 2%w/v and isopropyl alcohol 70% v/v
SNOMED code: 12775311000001103
GTIN: 27613203022099
Affected Lot Batch Numbers
Batch No.
Expiry Date
Pack Size
First Distributed
All lots with an expiry date up to and including 02/2028 *
All lots with an expiry date up to and including 02/2028
ChloraPrep 1mL Applicator: 60 applicators
11/09/2023
All lots with an expiry date up to and including 01/2028 *
All lots with an expiry date up to and including 01/2028
ChloraPrep Frepp™ 1.5 ml Applicators: 20 applicators
09/01/2024
*  For a full list of impacted batches, see
Annex 1
Background
Becton Dickinson UK Ltd are recalling batches of ChloraPrep 2% w/v / 70% v/v cutaneous solution 1mL applicators and ChloraPrep Frepp 2% w/v / 70% v/v cutaneous solution 1.5 mL applicators due to a potential breach of sterility in the packaging process. The recall applies to all batches with an expiry date up to and including 02/2028. Batches with an expiry date after 02/2028 are not impacted.
This defect could increase the risk of the applicator device being contaminated with pathogens, which could lead to increased infection rates for the patients. The number of impacted units in each batch is unknown, therefore the batches included in
Annex 1
are being recalled as a precautionary measure.
The full list of impacted batch details is included in
Annex 1
.
Advice for Healthcare Professionals:
Stop supplying the affected batches. Quarantine all remaining stock and return it to your supplier using your supplier’s approved process.
Advice for Healthcare Professionals to Provide to Patients:
No further action is required by patients as this product is used by healthcare professionals only and they will have taken the action to remove this product from use.
The recall is a precautionary measure to mitigate any additional risk of infection.
Patients who experience adverse reactions or have any questions about their medication should seek medical attention. Any suspected adverse reactions should also be reported via the
MHRA Yellow Card scheme.
Additional information:
For all medical information enquiries and information on this product, please email
safetyinformation@bd.com
,  or telephone 08000437546.
For stock control enquiries please email
info@insightbio.com
,  or telephone 01707351330.
Recipients of this Medicines Recall should bring it to the attention of relevant contacts by copy of this notice. NHS regional teams are asked to forward this to community pharmacists and dispensing general practitioners for information.
Yours faithfully
Defective Medicines Report Centre
10 South Colonnade
Canary Wharf
London
E14 4PU
Telephone +44 (0)20 3080 6574
DMRC@mhra.gov.uk
